name: trace_window_edge_drag
description: v2.7.2 W2: idle header stays paint-free, then real hover reveals dump-ground-truth ports. The profile presses the RIGHT port and drags left by about two visible week units, captures the live candidate pill and header-only preview pixel diff, then releases. W2's CommitWindowGesture seam must clear the preview without mutating PP_DOC or rebuilding shapes.
